title: Method Level 1B — Expansion
summary: More rhythmic variety with eighth notes, longer phrases, left-hand independence, and three folk songs — all within C position.

exercises.title: Quarter Pattern A
exercises.summary: Right hand plays longer quarter-note phrases across the full C position.
exercises.goal: Play all five C-position notes evenly in longer quarter-note passages.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Thirds and Fifths
exercises.summary: Right hand skips a third to E and a fifth to G from C.
exercises.goal: Recognize and play thirds (C–E) and fifths (C–G) with the right hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Hot Cross Buns
exercises.summary: The traditional nursery song Hot Cross Buns arranged in C position using three notes.
exercises.goal: Play Hot Cross Buns from memory using just three notes (C, D, E).

license.notes: Traditional melody in the public domain. Arrangement CC0.

exercises.title: Step and Rest
exercises.summary: Quarter notes separated by rests — counting silence within a phrase.
exercises.goal: Count quarter and half rests accurately and resume on time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Merrily We Roll Along
exercises.summary: The traditional song Merrily We Roll Along arranged in C position.
exercises.goal: Play Merrily We Roll Along with clear half notes at phrase endings.

license.notes: Traditional melody in the public domain. Arrangement CC0.

exercises.title: Top to Bottom
exercises.summary: Right hand descends from G4 to C4 in varied rhythms.
exercises.goal: Play a descending C-position melody with control.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz Steps
exercises.summary: Right hand plays a three-beat stepping melody.
exercises.goal: Feel a strong downbeat and even beat 2–3 in 3/4 time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: March Pattern
exercises.summary: Right hand plays crisp two-beat figures with eighth-note pickups in march style.
exercises.goal: Feel a strong, even two-beat pulse with eighth-note figures.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Slow Melody
exercises.summary: A half-note melody requiring a full, ringing tone.
exercises.goal: Sustain half notes for their complete value with relaxed arm weight.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mary Had a Little Lamb
exercises.summary: The beloved nursery song Mary Had a Little Lamb in C position.
exercises.goal: Play the complete Mary Had a Little Lamb melody resolving to C.

license.notes: Traditional melody in the public domain. Arrangement CC0.

exercises.title: Bass Quarter Walk
exercises.summary: Left hand plays longer quarter-note passages through bass C position.
exercises.goal: Read all five C-position notes in bass clef in extended phrases.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Skips
exercises.summary: Left hand skips a third and a fifth from bass C.
exercises.goal: Play thirds (C3–E3) and fifths (C3–G3) with the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Mixed Values
exercises.summary: Left hand melody mixing quarter and half notes.
exercises.goal: Read and play mixed note values in bass clef with steady tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Waltz
exercises.summary: Left hand in 3/4, stepping through bass C position.
exercises.goal: Count three beats per measure in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass March
exercises.summary: Left hand plays crisp two-beat figures with eighth notes in march time.
exercises.goal: Keep a steady two-beat pulse with eighth-note figures in the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass With Rests
exercises.summary: Left hand steps with half rests — counting silence in the bass.
exercises.goal: Hold longer rests in bass clef without rushing the next note.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Descent
exercises.summary: Left hand descends from G3 through the full C position.
exercises.goal: Play a smooth descending passage in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Whole Note Voyage
exercises.summary: Wide-spaced whole notes in low register — tone control study.
exercises.goal: Produce a full, singing tone on each whole note in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Skip and Step
exercises.summary: Right hand mixes skips, steps, and eighth notes in a longer flowing phrase.
exercises.goal: Navigate a melody combining steps, skips, and eighth notes without hesitation.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Expansion Capstone
exercises.summary: A five-measure review mixing steps, skips, varied rhythms, eighth notes, and a rest.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate all Level 1B skills — steps, skips, mixed values, eighths, and rests — in one piece.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
